ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number associated with the issue */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the issue */,
  "component" TEXT /* Component of the software the issue relates to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software impacted by the issue */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Milestone associated with the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the issue (e.g., bug, feature request) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue is associated with */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to resolve the issue */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* Actual time taken to resolve the issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution description */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the issue */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_component FOREIGN KEY ("component") REFERENCES components ("component_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_milestone FOREIGN KEY ("milestone") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the component is associated with */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 2.1) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the version is associated with */,
  "build_number" TEXT /* Build number of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Summary of changes in the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the milestone is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the milestone */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the milestone was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue that was changed */,
  "changed_field" TEXT /* Field that was changed (e.g., status, owner) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue type was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the issue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
